import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = io.read_line()
  match line
  when Some(s)
    let parts = string.split_whitespace(s)
    let n = parts.len()
    if n == 0
      print("min_abs=0")
    else
      mut best = 0
      mut best_abs = 0
      mut i = 0
      while i < n
        match parts.get(i)
        when Some(tok)
          match string.parse_int(tok)
          when Some(v)
            mut a = v
            if a < 0
              a = -a
            end
            if i == 0 or a < best_abs
              best = v
              best_abs = a
            end
          when None
            ()
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
        i = i + 1
      end
      print("min_abs=#{best}")
    end
  when None
    print("min_abs=0")
  end
end
